.file-embed.background: rgb(28, 26, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(46, 46, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(28, 26, 25, 0.6) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(46, 46, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(46, 46, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(46, 46, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(167, 102, 37, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(46, 46, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(28, 26, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(28, 26, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(28, 26, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

thead.background: rgba(28, 26, 25, 0.6) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
